parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ workflow_id: $json.workflow_id, run_id: $json.run_id, source: $json.source, session_id: $json.session_id, dry_run: $json.dry_run, actions: $json.actions }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ event_type: 'notion_github_swarm_research', context: $('Summarize Findings').item.json.summary, outcome: $('Summarize Findings').item.json.status, tongue: 'RU', metadata: { run_id: $('Summarize Findings').item.json.run_id, trace: $('Summarize Findings').item.json.trace } }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'ok', pipeline: 'notion_github_swarm_research', run_id: $('Summarize Findings').item.json.run_id, summary: $('Summarize Findings').item.json.summary, training_status: $('Training Ingest').item.json.status || 'queued' }) }}
